summary: Iteration 13 Testing Complete - PLU Scoring Module for DC Land Prospecting. All 20 backend tests passed. Frontend displays PLU scoring in chatbot parcel cards and parcel detail panel.
passed_tests: === PLU SCORING QUICK ENDPOINT (6/6) ===
GET /api/scoring/plu/UI returns score=90, status=FAVORABLE, action=prospect_now
GET /api/scoring/plu/N returns score=0, status=EXCLUDED, exclusion_reason not null
GET /api/scoring/plu/A returns score=0, status=EXCLUDED
GET /api/scoring/plu/AU returns score=72, status=WATCHLIST, action=check_regulation_and_mayor
GET /api/scoring/plu/UD returns score=15, status=UNFAVORABLE, action=reject
GET /api/scoring/plu/UX returns score=90, status=FAVORABLE
=== PLU SCORING WITH ADJUSTMENTS (5/5) ===
POST /api/scoring/plu with brownfield+ZAC on UI zone returns score=100 with brownfield_bonus flag
POST /api/scoring/plu with urbanisation_conditionnee+proximite_habitat on AU returns score=50 with flags
POST /api/scoring/plu with reglement_text containing positive keywords increases score (≥93)
POST /api/scoring/plu with contrainte_patrimoniale on residential zone returns UNFAVORABLE status
POST /api/scoring/plu with risque_reglementaire_majeur on UI returns score=70 (-20 penalty)
=== PLU SCORING IN CHATBOT (2/2) ===
POST /api/chat parcel search returns parcels with plu_scoring field containing plu_score, plu_status, recommended_action
Chatbot auto-excludes EXCLUDED parcels from results (zones N/A not returned)
=== PLU SCORING IN DC SEARCH (1/1) ===
POST /api/dc/search returns sites with urbanism.plu_scoring field
=== PDF EXPORT (1/1) ===
POST /api/export/pdf with plu_scoring data returns valid PDF
=== STATUS RANGES (5/5) ===
FAVORABLE range: score 85-100 (UI zone = 90)
WATCHLIST range: score 65-84 (AU zone = 72)
CONDITIONAL range: score 45-64 (UM zone = 55)
UNFAVORABLE range: score 1-44 (UD zone = 15)
EXCLUDED range: score 0 (N zone = 0)
=== FRONTEND VERIFICATION ===
Dashboard loads with COCKPIT IMMO header and map
Chatbot opens with 'Assistant Cockpit Immo' panel
Chat parcel search returns parcel_results with PLU badges (PLU 72, PLU 55, etc.)
Parcel cards in chatbot show PLU score badge with color coding
Clicking parcel card opens ParcelDetail panel
ParcelDetail panel has 'Urbanisme — Scoring PLU' section with data-testid='plu-scoring-section'
PLU Scoring section displays: score bar, status badge, risk level, recommended action, flags
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - uses real IGN Carto API for cadastral parcels
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 tested the NEW PLU Scoring module for DC land prospecting. Key findings: 1) All PLU scoring endpoints work correctly with proper score ranges and status assignments. 2) Hard exclusions work for N/A zones (score=0, status=EXCLUDED). 3) Adjustments work correctly: brownfield (+10), ZAC (+8), equipment (+7), urbanisation_conditionnee (-12), proximite_habitat (-10), contrainte_patrimoniale (-18), risque_majeur (-20). 4) Keyword parsing from reglement_text adds +3 to +5 for positive keywords. 5) Chatbot auto-excludes EXCLUDED parcels from results. 6) Frontend displays PLU scoring in chatbot parcel cards and ParcelDetail panel with score bar, status badge, risk level, recommended action, and flags.

integrations.chatbot: plu_scoring field in parcel results, auto-excludes EXCLUDED parcels
integrations.pdf_export: PLU Scoring section in PDF fiche

frontend_display.chatbot_parcel_cards: PLU score badge with color coding
frontend_display.parcel_detail_panel: Full PLU Scoring section with score bar, status, risk, action, flags

mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs - uses real IGN Carto API for cadastral parcels and Emergent LLM key for NLP parsing
